# Renko Nifty Bot

> Automated NIFTY Futures algorithmic trading bot that executes a Renko-chart strategy (50-point brick size, 1-minute timeframe) on the Angel One SmartAPI with real-money order execution.

## Overview

Renko Nifty Bot is a full-stack algorithmic trading application. It builds Renko bricks from live NIFTY Futures market data and places real orders through a SEBI-compliant static-IP routed connection to Angel One. The bot enters short trades when two red bricks form and manages exits based on green-brick reversal rules.

## Key Features

- Live Renko chart (50-point brick, 1-minute close) with interactive zoom and pan
- Short-entry strategy on consecutive red bricks with green-brick exit logic
- Real-money order placement via Angel One SmartAPI
- Broker reconciliation panel to recover missed fills on restart
- Auto-reconnect watchdog for Angel One websocket drops
- Order and rejection log

## Notes

This is a private trading dashboard application and is not intended as public financial advice.
